title: Supply Chain Manager - Container Corporation of India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Container Corporation of India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Container Corporation of India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Container Corporation of India:
Container Corporation of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Container Corporation of India!
